title: Odeya CommandEnvelope
description: Language-neutral structural candidate for a fail-closed Odeya command request. This 0.5 resource is deliberately nonconstructible and not admitted while the exact CommandContractRecord and CommandContractRegistry identities remain unresolved; non-null digests in fixtures are comparison probes, not proof that resolution or admission occurred. It binds the canonical CommandContractRegistry subject name, a separate activation-proof shape, and a standalone member-reference shape; mutable aliases such as latest are unrepresentable. The logical payload_type_id is distinct from the exact JSON Schema resource plus canonical and closure digests; the record supplies dialect and source-blob identity. Presented authority hints are untrusted. JSON Schema does not prove activation, membership, identity equality, scope approval, currentness, or admission, and a future schema-resource reissue is required before construction can be admitted.

x-odeya-digest-scope.subject: exact retained artifact or profile document bytes
